title: Loris Energy
description: Loris Energy adds a dynamic energy system where sprinting, jumping, and attacking drain stamina. A visual energy bar helps manage endurance, encouraging strategic movement.
body:
# **⚡ Loris Energy**

Strategic Energy Management - A sophisticated stamina system that transforms movement and combat into meaningful tactical decisions.


## **✨ Core Features**
## **🔋 Dynamic Energy System**

—   Action-Based Consumption - Sprinting, jumping, and attacking drain energy at configurable rates
  
—   Smart Regeneration - Energy recovers over time with acceleration mechanics when resting
  
—   Exhaustion Effects - Movement penalties and ability restrictions when energy depletes



## **🎯 Adaptive Visual Interface**
—   Custom Lightning Icons - Clean HUD display showing current energy status
  
—   Water-Responsive Positioning - Automatically raises when swimming to avoid breath meter overlap
  
—   Fully Configurable Display - Choose position, scale, direction, and visibility


## **⚙️ Complete Customization**

—   Client-Side Settings - Access all visual options through in-game mod menu

—   Server-Side Configuration - Balance gameplay mechanics via config files

—   Real-Time Adjustments - Changes apply immediately without restarts


### _Modpack Ready - Perfect for custom modpacks ;)_
